author: pd-codes
name: DashboardExample
short: Example cog for the PDC web dashboard integration.
description: Shows a widget (KPI) and a panel (form) for the PDC web dashboard. Integrates only when the WebDashboard cog is loaded, and works without it too.
install_msg: Also load `pdc_webdashboard` to see the integration in the web dashboard. Check with `[p]dashboardexample`.
end_user_data_statement: This example cog stores an optional welcome message and a channel per server. No personal data is stored.
